description: Definition-of-Done tiers for the voice serving track. dod_gate.hexa verify uses these rules to block roadmap status promotion until artifact evidence is present.

scaffold_done.description: Profile catalog + parameter emit. No real TTS. Self-similarity distinct-rate gate only.

wired_done.description: neural_vocoder.hexa conditioning input wired to profile_to_param_vector. Synthesizer forward path runnable in dry-run mode without producing audio.

serving_done.description: Real TTS synthesis produces .wav artifact within latency and quality budget. Blind listening score collected against ground truth.
